result.stdout:
Description:
  RoslynMCP - Roslyn-based Model Context Protocol server

Usage:
  RoslynMCP [options]

Options:
  -s, --stdio        Use stdio transport for MCP communication (default) [default: True]
  --http             Use HTTP transport for MCP communication (requires explicit flag) [default: False]
  -p, --port <port>  Port number for HTTP transport [default: 5000]
  --version          Show version information
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  RoslynMCP - Roslyn-based Model Context Protocol server

Usage:
  RoslynMCP [options]

Options:
  -s, --stdio        Use stdio transport for MCP communication (default) [default: True]
  --http             Use HTTP transport for MCP communication (requires explicit flag) [default: False]
  -p, --port <port>  Port number for HTTP transport [default: 5000]
  --version          Show version information
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information
